design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate platforming levels as Pero the Cat, overcome obstacles and enemies to progress through story-based locations tied to Around the World in Eighty Days narrative
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Play as Toei Animation's mascot character Pero, experience classic adventure story through interactive platforming
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Licensed adaptation of classic literature and anime property; focuses on character-driven platforming rather than mechanical innovation. Uncompiled code suggests multiple enemy/obstacle archetypes (ships, smoke, balloons, submarines, boots, numbered obstacles) indicating deliberate enemy variety design

progression.unlock_mechanism: Story-based progression through world locations matching Around the World in Eighty Days structure

world_building_techniques: Narrative adaptation of classic literature (Around the World in Eighty Days)

danger_signals: Multiple enemy archetypes present in level design (ships, smoke enemies, balloons, submarines)
Environmental obstacles tied to journey theme
environmental_storytelling: Locations reflect Around the World in Eighty Days journey
Enemy types suggest different environmental challenges (air, water, land based)

sources_used: tcrf - Puss n Boots: Pero's Great Adventure (The Cutting Room Floor)
